docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MIZE, TRAVIS AS TO DEFENDANT ROADRUNNER SCOOTERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
